rootNode.content: It's a drizzly night in New York City, 1947. I'm Jack Murphy, a hard-boiled detective with a penchant for whiskey and a knack for getting in over my head. I've been hired by a mysterious woman named Sophia to investigate the murder of her brother, a local occult expert. The police have given up on the case, but I've got a feeling there's more to it than meets the eye. I start by interviewing Sophia, who tells me that her brother was researching an ancient prophecy that predicted the rise of a powerful figure in New York City. She thinks this prophecy might be connected to his murder.

options.text: Head to the local occult shop to dig up more information

nextNode.content: I hit up the local occult shop, where I meet a shady character named Max who claims to have known the victim. Max tells me that the victim was researching a ancient text that spoke of a powerful artifact hidden somewhere in the city. He gives me a cryptic clue that might lead me to the artifact, but warns me that I'm not the only one looking for it.

options.text: Investigate the city's underground tunnels for the artifact

nextNode.content: I spend the night crawling through the city's underground tunnels, searching for any sign of the artifact. I come across a hidden chamber deep beneath the city, where I find a cryptic message etched into the wall. It reads: 'The artifact lies where the city's secrets sleep'. I'm not sure what it means, but I have a feeling I'm getting close.

options.text: Head to the city's oldest cemetery to look for more clues

nextNode.content: I spend the day exploring the city's oldest cemetery, searching for any connection to the artifact. I come across a grave with a mysterious symbol etched into it. Suddenly, I hear a noise behind me and turn to see a figure lurking in the shadows. It's a woman with piercing green eyes, who whispers a single word in my ear: 'Run'.

options.text: Search the city's museums for more information on the ancient prophecy

nextNode.content: I spend the day scouring the city's museums for any information on the ancient prophecy. I come across a rare text that speaks of a powerful artifact hidden in a location known only as 'The Place of the Ancients'. I'm not sure what it means, but I have a feeling I'm getting close.

options.text: Head to the city's oldest library to research more on the artifact

nextNode.content: I spend the day researching the artifact at the city's oldest library. I come across a hidden room deep in the stacks, where I find a ancient text that speaks of the artifact's true nature. It's not what I expected, and I'm not sure if I'm ready for what's coming.

options.text: Confront the woman with the piercing green eyes

nextNode.content: I track down the woman with the piercing green eyes, who reveals herself to be a powerful sorceress. She tells me that the artifact is not what I think it is, but rather a key to unlocking a far greater power. I'm not sure if I can trust her, but I have a feeling I'm running out of time.

options.text: Use the sorceress's information to find the artifact

nextNode.content: I use the sorceress's information to track down the artifact, which leads me to a hidden chamber deep beneath the city. I find the artifact, but it's not what I expected. It's a small, intricately carved box with a strange symbol etched into it. I'm not sure what it means, but I have a feeling I've uncovered a secret that was meant to remain hidden.

options.text: Refuse to trust the sorceress and try to find the artifact on my own

nextNode.content: I refuse to trust the sorceress and try to find the artifact on my own. I search the city from top to bottom, but I come up empty-handed. I realize too late that the sorceress was telling the truth, and I've wasted precious time. The artifact is gone, and I'm left with nothing but regret and a hint of what could have been.

options.text: Investigate the city's wealthy elite for any connections to the artifact

nextNode.content: I spend the night digging through the city's wealthy elite, looking for any connection to the artifact. I come across a wealthy businessman who seems to be hiding something. He tells me that he knows nothing about the artifact, but I'm not convinced.

options.text: Confront the businessman with my suspicions

nextNode.content: I confront the businessman with my suspicions, but he denies any involvement. I'm not sure if I believe him, but I'm not ready to give up yet.

options.text: Follow the businessman to see if he leads me to the artifact

nextNode.content: I follow the businessman, who leads me to a seedy part of town. I come across a hidden warehouse, where I find a group of thugs who seem to be working for the businessman. I realize that I've stumbled into something bigger than I ever could have imagined.

options.text: Confront the thugs and try to get to the bottom of the mystery

nextNode.content: I confront the thugs and try to get to the bottom of the mystery. I fight my way through them, but I'm not sure if I'll be able to uncover the truth. Suddenly, I hear a voice behind me. It's the sorceress, who whispers a single word in my ear: 'Run'.

options.text: Try to reason with the thugs and convince them to talk

nextNode.content: I try to reason with the thugs and convince them to talk. They're hesitant at first, but eventually they crack and tell me that the businessman is working with a powerful organization to uncover the artifact. They give me a cryptic clue that might lead me to the artifact, but I'm not sure if I can trust them.
